query: SELECT ct.id, ct.codigo, ct.clienteId, ct.titulo, ct.fila, ct.status, ct.criadoPorNome, c.razaoSocial, c.cnpj FROM credit_tasks ct LEFT JOIN clientes c ON ct.clienteId = c.id ORDER BY ct.id
